title: Aureline AI prompt-composer plan contract
description: Boundary schema for the prompt_composer_plan_record, the prompt_composer_plan_section_record, and the prompt_composer_plan_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/prompt_composer_contract.md. Every composer_plan_ref the context-assembly contract quotes (schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json prompt_composer_session_record / prompt_composer_turn_draft_record / ai_context_assembly_record composer_plan_ref) resolves to exactly one prompt_composer_plan_record on this schema, so a reviewer can reconstruct how a prompt was assembled — which ordered sections it composed, which context segments were admitted / omitted / pinned, which repo-defined instruction and check bundles it referenced, which external tools it allowlisted, and which redaction posture applied — without reading the final model response. Plans may only narrow the policy bundle's provider / route / data-class / retention / tool allowlists; silent widening relative to the policy bundle is forbidden and denies with plan_attempted_widening. Raw prompt text, raw retrieved-document bodies, raw terminal / log bodies, raw generated artifact bytes, raw request / response payloads, raw user-supplied text, and raw credential material never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids, typed vocabulary, and structured narrowing sets only. The eventual AI / prompt-composer crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new section_role, plan_purpose_class, admission_policy_class, omission_reason_default_class, narrowing_mode_class, plan_lifecycle_state_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason is additive-minor and requires a prompt_composer_plan_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

prompt_composer_plan_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this prompt-composer plan vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets. Raw prompt text, raw document bodies, raw URLs, raw paths, and raw credential material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in prompt-composer plan review, admin reconciliation, support export, and claim-manifest review surfaces.

plan_purpose_class.description: Frozen plan-purpose vocabulary. Every plan names exactly one purpose so routing / policy / narrowing decisions can fan out to the right lane. disabled_no_plan is the canonical state for a row that exists but must not be cited; an assembly whose composer_plan_ref resolves to disabled_no_plan MUST deny with plan_disabled_no_invocation.

section_role.description: Frozen section-role vocabulary for an ordered prompt-composer plan. Every ordered section names exactly one role. fenced_tainted_data_block is the only role permitted to host segments whose trust_posture is untrusted_* or policy_quarantined; system_scaffold_prologue / composer_plan_directive / repo_instruction_bundle_block / repo_check_bundle_block / workspace_pinned_instructions_block / user_profile_instructions_block never host tainted bytes regardless of budget pressure.

admission_policy_class.description: Frozen admission-policy-class vocabulary for an ordered section. Names how the section admits segments at assembly time. deny_all_section_disabled is the canonical state for a section the plan has authored but disabled (for example a support-replay plan that keeps the slot for parity audit but refuses to populate it); a disabled section MUST NOT receive segments.

omission_reason_default_class.description: Frozen omission-reason-default-class vocabulary. The plan may name the typed omit_reason the composer should apply when budget or scope pressure forces a segment out of an admitted section; every value maps one-to-one onto a schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json omit_reason. An omitted segment without a typed reason is non-conforming.

narrowing_mode_class.description: Frozen narrowing-mode vocabulary. Declares how each narrowing axis (provider_classes, route_path_classes, data_classes, retention_stances, tool_allowlist) composes with the policy bundle. plan_inherits_policy_set = the plan does not narrow this axis; the policy bundle's admitted set applies. plan_narrows_to_listed_subset = the plan lists a strict subset of the policy bundle's admitted set. plan_denies_all = the plan denies every candidate on this axis (e.g. a no-tools plan).

plan_lifecycle_state_class.description: Frozen plan-lifecycle vocabulary. A plan whose state is plan_draft, plan_in_review, plan_quarantined_pending_review, plan_withdrawn_by_operator, plan_superseded_by_replacement, or plan_disabled_policy_blocked MUST NOT be cited on a live composer session; an assembly that cites it denies with plan_not_in_production.

section_budget_policy_class.description: Frozen section-budget-policy vocabulary. Names how the plan's resolver should treat budget pressure on this section. budget_pinned_no_budget_pressure is the only admitted value when the section contains pinned segments; a pinned segment that is dropped under budget pressure is non-conforming and denies with pinned_segment_dropped_under_budget_pressure.

tool_narrowing_posture_class.description: Frozen tool-narrowing-posture vocabulary. A plan that denies all tools declares no_tools_admitted; a plan that narrows the policy bundle's admitted tool set declares allowlisted_subset_of_policy and names the subset on tool_allowlist_refs; a plan that only subtracts specific tools declares explicit_denylist_narrows_policy and lists the denied tools on tool_denylist_refs.

provider_class.description: Provider-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

route_path_class.description: Route-path-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

data_class.description: Data-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json without modification. credential_handle_denied_always and secret_projection_denied_always remain on the denied-always set on every plan; a plan that attempts to admit them denies with plan_data_class_denied_always_violation.

retention_stance_class.description: Retention-stance vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json without modification.

source_class.description: Source-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

trust_posture.description: Trust-posture vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

tainted_fence_strategy.description: Tainted-content fence-strategy vocabulary re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

redaction_class.description: Redaction class re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

freshness_class.description: Freshness-class vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

client_scope.description: Client-scope vocabulary re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011).

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the prompt_composer_plan audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw prompt text, raw document bodies, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort plan admission, a best-effort narrowing, or a best-effort tainted placement is forbidden.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

deployment_profile_class.description: Deployment-profile class re-exported from schemas/identity/policy_bundle.schema.json without modification.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Empty string when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. Re-validated on every dispatch; a policy-epoch roll invalidates a prior plan citation and denies with policy_epoch_rolled_invalidations.

admitted_subset_note.description: Short reviewable sentence naming the subset the plan admits. Empty string when narrowing_mode_class = plan_inherits_policy_set.

narrowing_axis_record.description: Per-axis narrowing posture declared on a plan. The concrete admitted values for each axis live on the corresponding *_admitted arrays; this record just declares the narrowing mode so reviewers can distinguish 'plan inherits policy' from 'plan narrows to subset' from 'plan denies all' mechanically.

section_slot_index.description: Stable zero-based slot index. The composer resolves sections in ascending slot index; reviewers reconstruct the ordered prompt shape from this field alone.

section_slug.description: Short, stable, human-readable slug for the section (for example 'repo_agents_block', 'user_turn', 'fenced_retrieved_data'). Safe to render in review / support / audit surfaces.

admitted_source_classes.description: Subset of context_assembly source_class values the section admits. Empty when admission_policy_class = deny_all_section_disabled or admit_only_pinned_segments.

admitted_trust_postures.description: Subset of context_assembly trust_posture values the section admits. Empty when admission_policy_class = deny_all_section_disabled.

pinned_segment_refs.description: Opaque segment ids the plan pins to this section. Pinned segments survive budget pressure; a pinned segment dropped under budget is non-conforming. Required (non-empty) when admission_policy_class = admit_only_pinned_segments.

instruction_bundle_refs.description: Opaque references to repo-defined / workspace-defined instruction bundles (repo_agents_file, repo_contributing_file, repo_style_guide, repo_review_checklist, repo_test_plan, workspace_pinned_instructions, user_profile_instructions, extension_injected_instructions). Required (non-empty) when admission_policy_class = admit_only_instruction_bundle_refs.

check_bundle_refs.description: Opaque references to repo-defined / workspace-defined check bundles. Required (non-empty) when admission_policy_class = admit_only_check_bundle_refs.

default_fence_strategy.description: Default fence strategy the composer applies to tainted segments placed into this section. Required (non-null) when hosts_tainted_data = true; MUST be null otherwise. fenced_tainted_data_block is the only section_role permitted to set hosts_tainted_data = true.

hosts_tainted_data.description: True when the section is the fenced slot for tainted segments. Exactly one section on a plan MAY set this to true (the fenced_tainted_data_block); every tainted segment placed on the assembly MUST route to that section.

default_omission_reason_class.description: Typed default omission reason the composer applies when a candidate segment is admitted by policy but dropped under budget / scope pressure. Null when admission_policy_class ∈ {admit_only_pinned_segments, deny_all_section_disabled}.

budget_floor_hint_units.description: Optional floor on section size (opaque provider units or tokens, as declared on the plan's byte_budget_units). Used by the resolver to keep the section from collapsing under budget pressure.

budget_ceiling_hint_units.description: Optional ceiling on section size. budget_floor_hint_units MUST be <= budget_ceiling_hint_units when both are non-null.

section_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence summarising the section's intent (for example 'pins the entry-point symbol and related tests', 'quoted-as-data fence for retrieved documents'). Safe for support export and claim review.

ordered_section_record.description: One ordered section of a prompt-composer plan. Reserves the section shape so later composer UX work cannot smuggle a private section kind past review.

allOf.description: default_fence_strategy MUST be non-null when hosts_tainted_data = true.

plan_id.description: Stable id for the plan. composer_plan_ref on every prompt_composer_session_record / prompt_composer_turn_draft_record / ai_context_assembly_record resolves to this id. The id is stable across version bumps; version identity is carried on plan_version_label and content_digest.

plan_version_label.description: Machine-readable version or digest label (for example 'v3.7.1', '2026-03-04-rev7', or an opaque digest reference). Every assembly citing the plan also cites this version so downstream support / replay can reconstruct the exact plan text.

digest_algorithm.description: Digest algorithm the publisher used to hash the plan's canonical serialisation.

digest_hex.description: Lowercase hex digest of the plan's canonical serialisation. Reviewers compare this against the plan pack manifest's digest to confirm the two match.

content_digest.description: Optional content digest pinning the plan's canonical serialisation. Null when the pack only carries a version label and no inline digest; the plan pack manifest still carries the authoritative digest.

plan_pack_ref.description: Opaque reference to the prompt_pack_manifest_record (schemas/ai/prompt_tool_pack_manifest.schema.json) that packages this plan. Every plan MUST resolve to exactly one pack; unresolved packs deny with repo_instruction_bundle_ref_unresolvable on the assembly stream and with plan_pack_ref_unresolvable on the pack-manifest stream.

display_label.description: Short reviewable label for the plan the composer / admin / support surfaces render verbatim.

supersedes_plan_ref.description: Opaque ref to the plan this record supersedes. Required (non-null) when plan_lifecycle_state_class = plan_superseded_by_replacement.

replacement_plan_ref.description: Opaque ref to the replacement plan. Required (non-null) when plan_lifecycle_state_class = plan_deprecated_with_replacement.

ordered_sections.description: Ordered sections of the plan. Section slot indices MUST be unique and MUST start at 0 and increase without gaps (enforced at admission time, not by JSON Schema).

admitted_source_classes_global.description: Plan-wide admitted source_class set. A source_class not in this set MUST NOT appear on any section's admitted_source_classes; a conformance check enforces the subset relation. Empty when plan_purpose_class = disabled_no_plan.

admitted_trust_postures_global.description: Plan-wide admitted trust_posture set. Same subset discipline as admitted_source_classes_global.

admitted_provider_classes.description: Subset of provider classes the plan admits. Interpreted under provider_class_narrowing.narrowing_mode_class: plan_inherits_policy_set ⇒ this list is advisory; plan_narrows_to_listed_subset ⇒ this list IS the admitted set; plan_denies_all ⇒ this list MUST be empty.

admitted_data_classes.description: Admitted data-class allowlist. credential_handle_denied_always and secret_projection_denied_always MUST NOT appear on this list regardless of narrowing mode.

tool_allowlist_refs.description: Opaque refs to external-tool-registry entries the plan admits (tool_entry_id on schemas/ai/external_tool_registry.schema.json). Required (non-empty) when tool_narrowing_posture_class = allowlisted_subset_of_policy; MUST be empty when tool_narrowing_posture_class = no_tools_admitted or disabled_no_tool_posture.

tool_denylist_refs.description: Opaque refs to external-tool-registry entries the plan explicitly denies. Intersection with tool_allowlist_refs MUST be empty; both may be empty when tool_narrowing_posture_class = inherits_policy_set.

byte_budget_units.description: Declared budget units for every byte_budget_hint on segments assembled under this plan. Matches schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json byte_budget_hint.budget_units.

byte_budget_total_target.description: Optional plan-wide budget target across every section. Null when the plan defers to the spend-plan's budget_token_estimate.

maximum_freshness_floor.description: Optional freshness floor the composer applies when admitting segments. Segments whose freshness_class is below the floor (e.g. stale or unverified when floor = warm_cached) are omitted with plan_default_freshness_floor_unmet.

fence_strategy_default.description: Plan-wide default fence strategy for tainted segments when a section does not override it.

changelog_refs.description: Opaque refs to changelog / release-note entries explaining what this plan version changed. Downstream support / replay tooling follows these to explain a downgrade or version roll.

closed_at.description: Timestamp at which the plan was withdrawn / superseded / deprecated. Null while the plan is live.

allOf.description: plan_denies_all tool narrowing requires an empty tool_allowlist_refs.

prompt_composer_plan_record.description: A prompt-composer plan. Governs exactly how an AI turn's prompt is assembled — ordered sections, admitted source / trust / data / provider / route / retention subsets, tool allowlist, redaction posture — relative to the policy bundle. The plan may only narrow; it may never widen. Silent widening denies with plan_attempted_widening at admission time.

plan_ref.description: Opaque ref to the owning prompt_composer_plan_record. The section is a projection of one entry on that plan's ordered_sections; admin / diff / support tools MAY persist it standalone without reloading the whole plan.

prompt_composer_plan_section_record.description: Stand-alone projection of one ordered_section_record for admin / diff / support / claim-manifest tooling that wants to iterate sections without reloading the whole plan. The authoritative ordering still lives on the plan record's ordered_sections array.

allOf.description: denial_reason MUST be non-null for prompt_composer_plan_denial_emitted events.

prompt_composer_plan_audit_event_record.description: Audit event emitted on the prompt_composer_plan audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw prompt text, raw document bodies, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.
